FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class AutoSuggestBox

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

A WinUI AutoSuggestBox: an EditableText field whose filtered suggestions are hosted in a light-dismiss popup (an anchored overlay), not inline — so the list floats over content instead of reflowing the page and auto-flips above the box when there is no room below (same plumbing as ComboBox).

The list is opened iff the query is non-empty and there is at least one match (WinUI UpdateSuggestionListVisibility: open iff maxHeight > 0 ∧ count > 0), driven from a UseEffect keyed on the query so the open/close runs after the render commits (no side effects in render). The popup body is wrapped in its own Comp<T>(Func<T>) FluentGpu.Controls.SuggestionsList Component that subscribes to the shared query/highlight Signal<T>s, so it RE-FILTERS on every keystroke — an overlay content thunk is otherwise a one-shot snapshot (only re-evaluated when the OverlayHost version bumps on open/close).

TextChanged + reason (AutoSuggestBox_Partial.cpp OnTextBoxTextChanged :451–503). EVERY text change — user edit, programmatic restore, suggestion preview — Stop()+Start()s the 150ms timer (s_textChangedEventTimerDuration = 1500000 ticks) carrying the change's TextChangeReason (cpp:464), so the public TextChanged fires once typing pauses, with the LAST reason. Only UserInput changes cache m_userTypedText, reset the keyboard cursor and update the list visibility (cpp:477–496). Set DebounceMs=0 to fire synchronously.

SuggestionChosen + arrow preview (cpp OnSuggestionSelectionChanged :2298–2411). Moving the suggestion-list selection (arrow keys, row click) raises SuggestionChosen for the newly selected item; when UpdateTextOnSelect (default true, cpp:2366–2381) the item text is also previewed into the field with reason SuggestionChosen (cpp:2380). Stepping PAST either end restores the user-typed text with reason ProgrammaticChange and clears the selection (cpp:1101/1109). Enter submits the query (QueryText = the field text, ChosenSuggestion = the highlighted item) WITHOUT re-raising SuggestionChosen (cpp:1149–1160 + SubmitQuery :857–878). A row click runs SelectionChanged → SuggestionChosen → QuerySubmitted sequentially (cpp OnListViewItemClick :2413–2437). Escape restores the typed text and closes (cpp:634–643).

Corner-joining (WinUI AutoSuggestBoxHelper::UpdateCornerRadius / KeepInteriorCornersSquare=true). While the list is open the field squares the corners that abut the popup so the field+list read as one piece. WinUI squares the field BOTTOM (open-down) or TOP (open-up) and the matching popup edge; we square the field bottom corners (open-down — the dominant case) here. The popup-surface corner squaring is host-owned: FluentGpu.Controls.FlyoutSurface already receives the CornerJoin from FlyoutPositioner on its FluentGpu.Controls.OverlayEntry but currently renders Radii.OverlayAll unconditionally — see the deferred note in the task report (cannot be fixed from this file).

OnTextChanged 

public Action<string>? OnTextChanged

Field Value

Action<string>

PartQueryButton

The query-button plate (WinUI QueryButton — the INNER presenter that carries the TextControlButton chrome; the fixed 32×28 outer slot is not a part). Owned: OnClick (submit), Role.

public const string PartQueryButton = "QueryButton"

Field Value

string

PartQueryIcon

The query glyph (a TextEl — use Parts.Set<TextEl>; the glyph STRING is the QueryIcon prop). Owned: none.

public const string PartQueryIcon = "QueryIcon"

Field Value

string

PartRoot

The field surface root (the chrome + popup anchor). Owned: OnKeyDown (the Up/Down suggestion nav), Role, Children, OnRealized (the anchor capture, chained). The open-state corner squaring (KeepInteriorCornersSquare) is recomputed per render BEFORE the modifier — override Corners to opt out.

public const string PartRoot = "Root"

Field Value

string

PartSuggestionItem

EVERY suggestion row plate (a repeated part — the popup list is built per render, NOT virtualized/recycled). Owned: OnClick (choose + submit), Role. The keyboard-cursor/selected Fill is recomputed per render BEFORE the modifier.

public const string PartSuggestionItem = "SuggestionItem"

Field Value

string

PartSuggestionsList

The popup scroll host (WinUI SuggestionsList; a ScrollEl — use Parts.Set<ScrollEl>). Owned: Content (the row column), ContentSized (the size-to-rows mechanic). Modifiers run inside the popup body's render, so they re-evaluate per keystroke.

public const string PartSuggestionsList = "SuggestionsList"

Field Value

string

Parts

Lightweight per-part styling (CSS ::part): modifiers keyed by the PartXxx consts; see TemplateParts for the contract. The inner field chrome is the composed EditableText's own (not forwarded — its part names would collide with this control's).

public TemplateParts? Parts

TextChanged

WinUI TextChanged with AutoSuggestBoxTextChangedEventArgs.Reason (debounced 150ms; raised for EVERY change — UserInput / ProgrammaticChange / SuggestionChosen, cpp:451–469).

public Action<string, TextChangeReason>? TextChanged

Field Value

Action<string, TextChangeReason>

TextChangedDebounceMs 

public const float TextChangedDebounceMs = 150

Field Value

float

UpdateTextOnSelect

WinUI UpdateTextOnSelect (default true): arrow-cycling previews the highlighted item's text into the field (reason SuggestionChosen); false leaves the field text untouched while cycling — SuggestionChosen still fires per selection change (cpp:2361–2398 gates only the text write, :2367).

public bool UpdateTextOnSelect

Field Value

bool

Width 

public float Width

Field Value

float

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
